entry.title: hello world
entry.content:
Firing up this whole "blog" thing again. On some level I realize that a lot of it probably involves gradually making it easier for myself as opposed to cool static site generators that are just kind of a slog to even get a post into, but dangit, I'm trying.

Working with a combination of 11ty and DecapCMS, and this is pretty cool - it's the kind of thing I'd probably slow-roll for myself (or, more realistically, start making and then kinda flake out on finishing).
